name: scomp-link
description: End-to-end ML toolkit with 15 MCP tools for training, tuning, monitoring, visualization, and deployment.

tools.name: train_model
tools.description: Train a model with optional tuning and feature engineering

tools.name: validate_model
tools.description: Evaluate model on test data with metrics and HTML report

tools.name: detect_drift
tools.description: Check distribution drift between datasets (PSI + KS)

tools.name: check_fairness
tools.description: Compute fairness metrics (demographic parity, disparate impact)

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Create interactive HTML report with charts

tools.name: create_visualization
tools.description: Generate any of 39 chart types (Plotly, RAWGraphs, Highcharts)

tools.name: export_model
tools.description: Export .scomp to pickle, joblib, or ONNX

resources.description: Get schema and sample rows from a dataset

prompts.name: ml_workflow
prompts.description: Template for a complete ML pipeline
